api.prompt: Run the FastAPI dev server: uvicorn src.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000

gui.prompt: Run the CustomTkinter desktop app: python main.py

test.prompt: Run the test suite: pytest test/ -v

test:db.prompt: Start the MySQL Docker container for testing: docker compose up -d

migrate.prompt: Run Alembic migrations: alembic upgrade head

seed.prompt: Run the seed script: python seed_data.py

mkmig.prompt: Create a new auto-generated Alembic migration: alembic revision --autogenerate -m "${1:description}"

plan.description: Project plan, TODOs, and known bugs
